name: Tiftarea YMCA
description: Tiftarea YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tifton, GA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights, trainers or lessons, restrooms, and water.

name: Tift County Recreation Department
description: Tift County Recreation Department is a place to play pickleball in Tifton, GA. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.
